description: Set defaults for type-aware commands. set <type> applies to all; set <type> <command> applies only to that command.
Set the default command type to stress.
Set the default command type to the fixed non-stress baseline.
Set train command default type to stress.
Run native model training using the saved default type when no type is provided.
Run the stress training configuration.
Run the currently saved default type for train.
Run the fixed non-stress baseline training configuration.
Run the currently set default training type with an epoch override of 8.
Run the stress training type with an epoch override of 8.
Evaluate a saved native model against the saved default type when no type is provided.
Evaluate against the default benchmark file data/processed/benchmark_sft.jsonl.
Evaluate against the stress-native benchmark file data/processed/benchmark_stress_native_sft.jsonl.
Evaluate against the account tool-boundary benchmark.
Evaluate against the medical refusal-boundary benchmark.
Evaluate against the out-of-scope versus tool-needed boundary benchmark.
Generate teacher data, prepare the dataset, and rebuild SFT files in one command.
Generate 200 records with generation batch size 25, then prepare and convert the dataset.
Run only the Codex improvement pass against the latest completed run for the saved default type, or an explicitly named trainable type.
Run the standalone Codex improvement pass against the latest stress run.
Evaluate a saved native model directly with the default evaluator settings.
Watch live native training status.
Refresh and open the training run summary CSV.
Run the automated train -> benchmark -> Codex improvement loop using the saved default type when no type is provided.
Run at most 3 automation iterations on the saved default type.
Run the automation loop for the stress type.
Run at most 3 automation iterations for the stress type.
Run up to 10 automation iterations with each train set to 50 epochs on the saved default type.
Repo-local command to show or set saved defaults globally or per command.
Repo-local training wrapper. Uses the saved default trainable type when no type is provided.
Repo-local benchmark wrapper. Uses the saved default trainable type when no type is provided and supports explicit benchmark-only types.
Main automation loop and standalone improve entrypoint. Trainable types: default(dynamic), core, stress.
Show current type defaults. With no argument, shows global and per-command defaults.
Show the current default type for train only.
Repo-local command to show global or per-command default type settings.
